questionHtml:
Which cells are subject to attack by HIV?

A. Lymphocytes

B. Erythrocytes

C. Platelets

D. Phagocytes

meta.title: Which cells are subject to attack by HIV? A. Lymphocytes B. Erythrocytes C. Platelets D. Phagocytes
